articles.title: What Makes Phoenix Dancong Different from Other Oolongs?
articles.titleZh: 凤凰单丛与其他乌龙茶有何不同？
articles.summary: Origin, aroma and GI traceability behind Phoenix Dancong tea.
articles.summaryZh: 解析凤凰单丛的产地、香型与地理标志可追溯价值。
articles.body:
Phoenix Dancong is an oolong tea associated with Phoenix Mountain in Chaozhou, Guangdong. For beverage developers, its value is not only the oolong category but the highly aromatic profile that can show floral, honey, fruit and roasted notes depending on cultivar and processing.

For B2B use, the important point is origin control. Tea called Phoenix Dancong should be supported by traceable sourcing and clear production records. TeaSourcex works through the Yuanjin Chaozhou facility located within the Phoenix Dancong geographical indication protection area, supporting origin-verified ingredient supply for brands and manufacturers.
articles.bodyZh:
凤凰单丛是与广东潮州凤凰山相关的乌龙茶。对饮料开发者来说，它的价值不仅在于乌龙茶类本身，更在于高度芳香的风味表现，可根据品种与工艺呈现花香、蜜香、果香和焙火香。

对 B2B 应用而言，关键是产地控制。标称凤凰单丛的茶叶应具备可追溯采购和清晰生产记录。TeaSourcex 依托位于凤凰单丛地理标志保护区内的源津潮州工厂，为品牌与制造商提供可验证产地的茶叶原料供应。

articles.title: How Fresh-Extraction Technology Is Changing the RTD Tea Market
articles.titleZh: 鲜萃技术如何改变即饮茶市场
articles.summary: Why fresh-extracted RTD bases help brands balance speed, aroma and clean labels.
articles.summaryZh: 说明鲜萃即饮茶基底如何兼顾出品速度、香气与清洁标签。
articles.body:
Fresh-extraction technology is designed to preserve the natural aroma, color and active compounds of tea at the point of production. In foodservice, this can reduce preparation to seconds while keeping a profile closer to freshly made drinks.

For brands, the advantage is operational consistency: fewer steps, lower training burden and repeatable cup quality. For manufacturers, fresh-extracted bases can provide a cleaner starting point for RTD formulation and product line extension.
articles.bodyZh:
鲜萃技术旨在生产环节保留茶叶的天然香气、色泽与活性成分。在餐饮场景中，它可以把出品时间缩短到数秒，同时保持更接近现制饮品的风味表现。

对品牌方来说，核心优势是运营稳定：步骤更少、培训负担更低、杯品质量更容易复现。对制造商来说，鲜萃茶基底可作为即饮茶配方和产品线扩展的清洁起点。

articles.title: 5 Things to Look for When Choosing a Tea Base Supplier
articles.titleZh: 选择茶基供应商时需要考虑的 5 个因素
articles.summary: A practical supplier checklist for tea beverage buyers.
articles.summaryZh: 面向茶饮采购方的供应商选择清单。
articles.body:
A strong tea base supplier should offer more than a good sample. Buyers should review factory capability, batch consistency, traceability, documentation and technical support.

The five key questions are: Does the supplier control production? Can they provide batch records and COA? Are samples tested in the target application? Can they scale from pilot to ongoing supply? Do they respond quickly when issues appear? TeaSourcex is built around factory-direct supply, in-house R&D and export documentation support.
articles.bodyZh:
优秀的茶基供应商不应只提供一份好喝的样品。采购方应评估工厂能力、批次稳定性、可追溯性、文件支持和技术服务。

五个关键问题是：供应商是否掌控生产？能否提供批次记录和 COA？样品是否在目标应用中测试？能否从小试放大到持续供货？出现问题时是否响应及时？TeaSourcex 的能力体系围绕工厂直供、内部研发和出口单证支持建立。

articles.title: OEM/ODM Tea Beverage Development Workflow
articles.summary: From product brief to commercial production handoff.
articles.summaryZh: 从产品简报到商业化生产交付。
articles.body:
An OEM/ODM tea beverage project starts with a clear brief: target market, consumer, pack format, price band, flavor direction and timeline. From there, the R&D team develops samples, confirms technical feasibility and moves the approved formula into pilot and production.

TeaSourcex covers consultation, formulation, sample iteration, production, packaging and export documentation so brand owners can focus on brand strategy and market launch.
articles.bodyZh:
OEM/ODM 茶饮项目始于清晰的产品简报：目标市场、消费者、包装形式、价格带、风味方向与时间规划。之后研发团队进行样品开发、技术可行性确认，并将确认配方推进到小试和量产。

TeaSourcex 覆盖需求沟通、配方研发、样品迭代、生产制造、包装标签和出口单证，让品牌方能够专注于品牌策略和市场发布。

articles.title: Phoenix Dancong GI Traceability for Beverage Brands
articles.titleZh: 面向饮品品牌的凤凰单丛地理标志追溯
articles.summary: How origin verification supports truthful product claims.
articles.summaryZh: 说明产地验证如何支持真实产品宣称。
articles.body:
Origin claims matter in premium tea beverages. When a brand communicates Phoenix Dancong, the ingredient should be supported by origin documentation and production traceability.

Yuanjin Chaozhou factory is positioned near Phoenix Mountain within the Phoenix Dancong GI protection zone, enabling TeaSourcex to support buyers with origin-backed Dancong ingredients and export-ready documentation.
articles.bodyZh:
在高端茶饮中，产地宣称非常重要。当品牌沟通凤凰单丛时，原料应具备产地文件和生产追溯支持。

源津潮州工厂毗邻凤凰山，位于凤凰单丛地理标志保护区内，使 TeaSourcex 能为买家提供有产地支撑的单丛茶原料与出口文件。

articles.title: Why F&B Chains Need an SOP Library for Tea Drinks
articles.titleZh: 为什么餐饮连锁需要茶饮 SOP 库
articles.summary: How recipes and standard procedures reduce training burden and improve consistency.
articles.summaryZh: 说明配方与标准流程如何降低培训成本并提升稳定性。
articles.body:
For F&B chains, a good product must be easy to reproduce across stores. SOPs convert product development into daily operations: ingredients, dosage, serving method, holding time and quality checks.

TeaSourcex builds SOP assets from real foodservice applications, helping operators launch new tea beverages quickly while keeping cup quality consistent.
articles.bodyZh:
对餐饮连锁来说，好产品必须能在多门店稳定复现。SOP 将产品开发转化为日常运营：原料、用量、出品方式、保存时间和质量检查。

TeaSourcex 基于真实餐饮应用建立 SOP 资产，帮助运营者快速上线新茶饮并保持杯品稳定。
